name: Deep Roots

name: In Order

name: Worn Path
description: Straight scores +20 pips

name: Trinity

name: Double Bloom

name: Hidden Pair

name: High Pair

name: Rare Bloom

name: House Rules

name: Triple Threat

name: Pair Up

name: Double Dutch

name: Enriched

name: Tidal Force
description: Flush scores +4 mult

name: Deluge
description: Flush ×2 score

name: Perfect Storm
description: Straight Flush ×5 score

name: Summit

name: Last Stand
description: If your score is below the round goal when you play, that hand scores x2.

name: Nimble
description: 2-card hands score +5 mult

name: Full Load
description: 5-card hands score +6 pips per card

name: Twenty-One
description: If the face values of your cards total exactly 21, score ×3

name: First Light
description: Aces score +5 pips

name: Ace's Blessing
description: Aces add +2 mult each

name: Face Value
description: Face cards (J/Q/K) are worth 15 pips

name: Court of Leaves
description: Face cards (J/Q/K) score +3 pips

name: King's Honour
description: Kings score +8 pips each

name: Knave's Gambit
description: Jacks add +2 mult each

name: Tens Strong
description: Tens score +7 pips each

name: Power of Two
description: Cards ranked 2 score +4 pips each

name: Triple Lucky
description: Any 3 in a hand adds +2 mult

name: Knave Power
description: Each Jack in hand multiplies running pips ×2 when scored

name: Humble Roots

name: Low Tide
description: Cards below 6 score +6 pips

name: Before the Tide
description: Cards below 6 score 6× their base pip value instead

name: Royal Trio
description: A hand containing K, Q, and J scores ×2

name: Rich Soil
description: All cards score +2 pips

name: Fertile Ground
description: All cards score +3 pips

name: First Fruits
description: Each card in first hand each round permanently gains +2 pips

name: Sapling
description: Each level, 3 cards permanently gain +2 pips

name: Early Bird
description: Hands in first 10s score +20 pips

name: Night Owl
description: Hands in last 10s score +3 mult

name: Closing Time
description: Hands played with 15s or less remaining score +5 mult

name: Quick Draw
description: Hands played within 3 seconds of the previous score +3 pips per card

name: Patient Hunter
description: Hands played more than 15s after the previous score +3 mult

name: Steady Pace
description: Each hand played scores +1 mult

name: Momentum
description: Consecutive hand within 5s scores +2 mult

name: Head Start
description: First hand each round scores +2 mult

name: Still Water
description: +5 mult for every 10 seconds elapsed without using a swap

name: Frozen Moment
description: Hands while timer paused score ×2

name: Kindling
description: Same hand streak scores +4 pips × streak

name: Wildfire
description: 3 same hands in a row scores +2 mult

name: Echo Hand
description: Playing the same hand type twice in a row scores ×1.5

name: On Fire
description: Streak of 4+ same hand adds +1 mult per count beyond 3

name: Devoted
description: Each scored heart adds +1 mult

name: Hard Labour
description: Each scored club adds +10 pips

name: Black & Red
description: All-red (hearts/diamonds) or all-black (clubs/spades) hand scores +3 mult

name: Rainbow
description: Hand containing all four suits scores +4 mult

name: Balanced
description: Hand with exactly 2 different suits scores +2 mult

name: Lucky Sevens
description: 7s ×2 score

name: Ninesong
description: If pip total is multiple of 9, ×3 score

name: Prime Time
description: Hands where all cards have prime pip values (2,3,5,7) score ×2

name: Even Stevens
description: Hands with only even-ranked cards (2,4,6,8,10,Q) score +3 mult

name: Odd Fellows
description: Hands with only odd-ranked cards (A,3,5,7,9,J,K) score +3 mult

name: Diversity
description: Hands with 4+ different ranks score +2 mult

name: All In
description: Hands where 3+ cards share the same rank score +2 mult per matching card

name: Triple Pips
description: Cards scored in a specific row or column contribute 3× pips

name: Power Line
description: Cards scored in a specific row or column each add +2 mult

name: Echo Line
description: Cards scored in a specific row or column score their pips twice

name: Ley Line
description: Cards scored at a specific grid intersection permanently double their pips (resets each level)

name: Four Corners
description: A 2×2 hand scores ×4

name: Crossroads
description: A + shaped hand scores ×3

name: Straight Shot
description: All-row or all-column hands add the first and last card's pip values to mult

name: Snake
description: A hand that changes direction every step scores +2 mult per card

name: Corner Power
description: Cards in corner cells score their pips twice

name: Diagonal
description: A hand containing 2 corner cells scores ×4

name: On the Edge
description: Hands where all cards are on the outer edge score +15 pips per card

name: Wide Reach
description: Hands spanning 4+ rows or columns score +24 mult. +5 mult per extra column, +20 pips per extra row

name: Column Rush
description: All cards in the same column add +2 mult per card

name: Row Power
description: All cards in the same row add +2 mult per card

name: Rising Tide
description: Base mult increases by +1 for each level reached

name: Veteran
description: +2 pips per level reached this run

name: Compound
description: Each hand played permanently adds +0.1 mult to this bonus

name: Prolific
description: Each hand played permanently adds +1 pip to this bonus

name: Penny Saved
description: Each 5 discarded or played permanently adds +5 pips to this bonus

name: Cloud Nine
description: Each 9 scored permanently adds +9 mult to this bonus

name: Perfect Ten
description: Every 10 cards discarded permanently adds +1 mult to this bonus

name: Lucky Roll
description: Every 6th card scored gains a random +1–6 mult permanently

name: Steady Fours
description: 4-card hands permanently give the 4th card +4 pips

name: Double Take
description: Each 2 scored counts its pips twice

name: Octave
description: Each 8 scored counts its pips twice

name: Snowball
description: After any hand scoring 500+ pips, each scored card permanently gains +2 pips

name: Jackpot
description: The first time a single hand scores 10,000+, permanently add +5 mult to this bonus

name: Royal Favour
description: After scoring, cards adjacent to Queens permanently gain +1 rank

name: Ace Absorb
description: When an Ace scores, one random adjacent card is forgotten and its bonuses added to the Ace (once per hand)

name: Sands of Time
description: Current round time remaining ÷ 2 added as pips

name: Compost
description: +3 pips per card discarded this round

name: Spade Flood
description: 4 or 5-card all-spade hands add 2× the remaining round time as pips

name: Dark Matter
description: Corrupted cards in a hand add +5 pips each

name: Combo Score
description: +2 mult for every distinct hand type played this round

name: Escalation
description: For each hand beyond the 5th in a round, score +1 mult

name: Meditation
description: Focus decays 1 second slower

name: Tunnel Vision
description: Start each round with 5 focus

name: First Wind
description: Focus does not decay for the first 45 seconds of a round

name: Rhythm
description: Each hand played adds 1 additional focus

name: Restless
description: Swapping adds 1 focus

name: Cull
description: Using a discard adds 1 focus

name: Expanse
description: Each time you hit max focus, increase max focus capacity by 1

name: Kaleidoscope
description: Playing one of each suit in a hand adds 4 focus

name: Flow State
description: While focus is ×1.5 or higher, +10 pips per card scored

name: Heartwood
description: Dead center card permanently gains +5 pips & +1 mult each time scored

name: The Queen
description: Wild rank — becomes the rank that makes the best hand. (Reach + queen-retrigger: TBD)
notes: structural — no tunable value; needsResolve / TBD

name: Warehouse
description: Wild suit — becomes any suit to complete a flush. Has no rank.

name: The Good Friend
description: Play it as part of a hand: exalts all adjacent cards. (3 charges)

name: Not a Friend
description: Discard it: corrupts all adjacent cards. (3 charges)

name: Shepherd
description: When drawn onto the grid, exalts 1 random card.

name: Idol
description: Finish the round with this on your board to earn 3× interest. (Once)

name: Shortcut
description: Play it in any 4-card hand to instantly complete the active challenge. (Once)

name: Fight the Power
description: While on the grid, all boss effects are ignored.

name: Dazed & Confused
description: When swapped, reshuffles every card on the grid.

name: Pivot!
description: When swapped, that swap is free and both swapped cards gain +5 mult permanently. (3 charges)

name: Echo
description: Play this in any hand: that hand scores twice. (3 charges)

name: Naturalist
description: Play this: each other scored card permanently gains +2 pips.

name: Bellhop
description: Play this: gain +2 swaps and +1 discard. (5 charges)

name: Bomb
description: Discard this: every card on the grid permanently gains +3 pips. (2 charges)

name: Legacy
description: Discard this: the next hand played scores ×3. (3 charges)

name: Cash Out
description: Discard this: gain 10 coins. (4 charges)

name: Lightning Rod
description: When swapped, the card it traded with permanently gains +5 pips.

name: Catalyst
description: When swapped, the card it traded with permanently gains +1 mult.

name: Wanderer
description: When swapped, refunds the swap (+1 swap back).

name: Amplifier
description: Double-tap: the next hand scores +5 mult. (5 charges)

name: Time Keeper
description: Double-tap: add +20 seconds to this round. (4 charges)

name: Piggy Bank
description: Double-tap: gain 5 coins. (5 charges)

name: Free Swaps
description: Swapping cards costs no time.

name: Free Discards
description: Discarding costs no time.

name: Steady Hand
description: Swaps no longer count against the swap limit, but cost 20s each.

name: Hoarder
description: Discards no longer count against the discard limit, but cost 6s per card.

name: Time Bank
description: +30 seconds at the start of every round.

name: Inheritance
description: Start each round with +5 coins.

name: Combo Keeper
description: Streaks survive one non-streak hand. Re-arms after 2 streak hands.

name: Lucky Seven
description: Every 7th hand played gives +1 swap.

name: Swap Shop
description: Start each round with +2 extra swaps.

name: Harvest
description: Start each round with +2 extra discards.

name: Pack Rat
description: Unused swaps carry over to the next round (max 8).

name: Collector
description: Unused discards carry over to the next round (max 8).

name: Clock Tower
description: Unused round seconds carry over (max 60s).

name: Safety Net
description: Once per game: if you miss the round goal, gain a 30s extension instead of failing.

name: Free Range
description: Can swap any two non-adjacent cards, but limited to 2 swaps per round.

name: extinction
description: Four of a Kind ×score (not in current pool)

name: resources
description: Base time costs: swap, discard/card, hand play

name: exalt
description: Exalted-card per-suit effects

name: corrupt
description: Corrupted-card per-suit effects
